title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search releases a news compilation covering 20+ AI developments including Happy Horse robotics, recursive multi-agent systems, Vista 4D vision models, Grok 4.3, SenseNova U1, and Talkie language model. The video highlights models from NVIDIA, Anthropic, Mistral, and open-source releases across computer vision, multimodal reasoning, and agentic systems.
